description: Capability for the alarms window. Almost no core API access — it invokes app-defined commands (cmd_get_alarms / cmd_save_alarms / cmd_close_alarms / cmd_window_ready), which are not capability-gated and are restricted to this window by the require_alarms() caller-check in src/commands.rs. core:event:allow-listen is granted so the unsaved-changes guard can register getCurrentWindow().onCloseRequested (src/unsaved-guard.ts).
